text_block_list.text:
As Stay Gold sustained an injury while 
training, she was taken to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
You got me there. I managed to 
stuff up spectacularly.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I understand that I should probably 
wind down for a while but…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If I lag behind now, we'll end up with a 
big gap in the middle of our journey.

These were the words spoken quietly by 
the girl. I could tell she was forcibly 
trying to return to training but…
choice_data_list: Then I'll leave it up to you

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
choice_data_list: …Let's not make it worse. Just rest for me.
…Let's not make it worse. Just rest.

text_block_list.text:
If she acts recklessly now, it would affect 
her next races, and end up influencing her 
life… I confronted her directly with these 
words.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I see… So those are you earnest 
words as my trainer huh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I got it. I'll trust your judgement.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh…… If that's what you're suggesting, 
then that means you thought this 
through?

I listed out all the gentle exercises I could 
think of right now. She looked convinced, 
and started to move…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ——Kuh……! Wait a sec, any more than this might be too much.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's my bad, I got too enthusiastic about 
it. Following my whims may not have 
been the best idea hey…

Despite coming up with a gentler training 
regime, the injury still seems serious… For 
the time being, we gave up on training and 
rested.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
This is good! It seems like there's less 
burden on my body if I exercise in water.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Also, it's kinda fun, feels sort of fresh 
compared to normal training.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I really have to give it to you Trainer, 
you helped me out. Let's keep it up!
